name: Technical Guide to Information Security Testing and Assessment
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-115 (2008) provides technical guidance on security testing — including penetration testing, vulnerability scanning, security control assessment. Widely referenced foundational document for security assessment programs.
relationToCloudSecurity: Used in cloud-environment penetration testing engagements.
relationToAISecurity: Foundational testing guidance applies to AI/ML systems.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

lifecycle.notes: Published 2008-09-30. Older but still widely cited.

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source PDF acquisition + extraction is TODO.

notes: Metadata stub; acquire from NIST CSRC and extract.
